subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which king founded the princely state of Jodhpur?
question_hi: जोधपुर के प्रांत क्या महाराज ने पहला किया ?
explanation_en: Rao Jodha, a Rajput chief, founded the city of Jodhpur and subsequently established the princely state of Jodhpur known as Rao Jodha's rule.

explanation_en: Jaswant Singh II, the founder of the Jat clan of Jaisalmer, established the princely state of Jaisalmer known as the rule of Jaswant Singh II.

question_en: Who founded the city of Jaisalmer?
explanation_en: Maharaja Sambhaji, also known as Rai Singh, was the founder of Jaisalmer. He established the city in 12373 AD.
